collectiondata.overview:
Best India to Egypt Tour Package – Discover the Land of Pharaohs and Pyramids

Welcome to Egypt, a land of pharaohs and pyramids, desert mysteries and timeless rivers. With Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency and your trusted Best International Tour Operator, experience Egypt like never before through immersive and thoughtfully curated Egypt tour packages. Whether you’re a curious historian, a romantic couple, or a family seeking cultural adventure, our packages promise memories carved in stone and golden sands.

Why Choose an Egypt Tour Package from India?

Direct Flight Options & Hassle-Free Visa Support for Indians
Indian travelers benefit from direct flight options and simplified visa processes. For the latest visa requirements and travel advisories, we recommend checking the official Egyptian Embassy website to ensure a smooth journey.

Ancient History, Majestic Monuments, and Unique Culture
Explore Egypt’s unparalleled heritage with iconic monuments such as the Pyramids of Giza, Luxor’s temples, and the Valley of the Kings. These sites not only embody ancient civilization but also offer captivating stories told by expert English-speaking Egyptologists.

Ideal for History Buffs, Families, Honeymooners, and Solo Travelers
Whether you’re booking Egypt tour packages from Delhi, Mumbai, or Kolkata, our tailored options cater to families, solo travelers, and honeymooners alike, with specialized experiences such as romantic Nile cruises and family-friendly guided tours.

Top India to Egypt Tour Packages

6 to 10 Days Egypt Tour Package – Cairo, Luxor & Aswan
Explore Egypt’s top highlights including Cairo’s pyramids and museums, Luxor’s ancient temples, and Aswan’s serene riverbanks. Optional hot air balloon rides over Luxor can be added for breathtaking views (additional cost applies).

Nile River Cruise Packages from India
Our India to Egypt tour package with Nile cruise offers luxury onboard entertainment and visits to riverside monuments, combining comfort and discovery in one seamless journey.

Egypt Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Our Egypt honeymoon packages feature romantic dinners under the stars, private Nile cruise cabins, and sunset desert safaris—creating unforgettable moments for couples. You can also browse our dedicated honeymoon packages for more romantic destinations.

Budget-Friendly Egypt Holiday Packages for Indian Travelers
Choose from affordable Egypt travel packages with well-curated itineraries, ensuring value without compromising on iconic experiences.

Customizable Egypt Itineraries for Families and Groups
Whether it’s a family trip or a group adventure, customize your itinerary to include cultural experiences, desert safaris, or visits to lesser-known sites like Nubian villages.

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Egypt Tour Packages

Cairo – Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum
Stand before the majestic Pyramids of Giza and the mysterious Sphinx, then marvel at Tutankhamun’s treasures in the Egyptian Museum. Our India to Egypt tour package with Egyptian museum visit includes guided tours by expert Egyptologists.

Luxor – Karnak Temple, Valley of the Kings & Hot Air Balloon Ride
Discover the grandeur of Karnak Temple and explore the tombs of pharaohs in the Valley of the Kings. Add a hot air balloon ride to see Luxor’s vast archaeological landscape from above (additional cost).

Aswan – Philae Temple, Unfinished Obelisk & Nubian Villages
Experience tranquility on the Nile’s banks, visit the beautiful Philae Temple, and meet Nubian locals to understand their rich cultural heritage.

Nile River Cruise – Luxurious Journey with Onboard Entertainment
Enjoy world-class amenities, live entertainment, and daily excursions as you cruise through Egypt’s heartland.

Alexandria – Roman Ruins and Mediterranean Coastline
Explore the Greco-Roman legacy in Alexandria with visits to the Qaitbay Citadel, Kom el Shoqafa catacombs, and the contemporary Library of Alexandria.

What’s Included in the Best India to Egypt Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Flights operate from Delhi, Mumbai, and Kolkata with convenient schedules. Passport validity of at least six months is recommended.

Hotel Stays and Optional Nile Cruise Accommodation
Choose from luxury hotels in Cairo, 5-star Nile cruise cabins, and boutique accommodations depending on your package.

Guided Sightseeing with English-Speaking Egyptologists
Expert guides ensure deep historical insight and engaging storytelling at every landmark.

Local Transfers, Entry Tickets & Egypt Visa Assistance
We handle local transport and entry fees for smooth travel. Visa assistance includes the latest documentation requirements. Please note: Optional activities such as hot air balloon rides and desert safaris may incur additional costs.

Best Time to Visit Egypt from India

October to April – Cool, Comfortable Sightseeing Weather
This period offers the best conditions for exploring Egypt’s deserts and archaeological sites.

May to September – Off-Season Benefits and Travel Deals
Travel during these months for fewer crowds and discounted tour packages, though temperatures can be high.

Seasonal Tips for Packing and Desert Travel
Bring sun protection for daytime and warmer clothing for chilly desert nights.

Frequently Asked Questions About Egypt Tour Packages from India

Do Indian citizens need a visa to travel to Egypt?
Yes, a visa is required but can be obtained easily with our assistance.

How many days are sufficient for a complete Egypt trip?
A 6 to 10-day itinerary covers major highlights comfortably.

Is Egypt safe and family-friendly for Indian tourists?
Yes, Egypt is safe with family-friendly attractions and guided tours.

What is the Egypt travel cost?
The Egypt travel cost varies based on package and inclusions, typically ranging between ₹70,000 and ₹1,50,000.

Does the India to Egypt tour package include a Nile cruise?
Yes, our India to Egypt tour package with Nile cruise includes luxury river travel with daily excursions.

Is there an India to Egypt tour package including pyramids visit?
Absolutely, every package includes visits to the iconic Pyramids of Giza.

Are desert safaris part of the India to Egypt tour package?
Yes, select itineraries offer desert safari experiences as optional add-ons.

Does the India to Egypt tour package include a visit to the Egyptian Museum?
Yes, guided tours of the Egyptian Museum are included in our comprehensive packages.

Is Abu Simbel temple visit included in the India to Egypt tour package?
Yes, optional visits to the Abu Simbel temples can be arranged to explore this UNESCO World Heritage Site, an architectural marvel built by Ramses II.

How to Book the Best Egypt Tour Package from India

Recommended Indian Travel Agencies Offering Egypt Packages
Book with trusted agencies like Travelxploria for verified packages from Delhi, Mumbai, or Kolkata.

Online Booking Tips and Exclusive Offers
Look out for early bird discounts and seasonal deals when booking online.

Documents Required, Currency Tips, and Local Etiquette
Carry a valid passport, travel insurance, and familiarize yourself with Egyptian customs for a smooth experience. It is advisable to carry some local currency (Egyptian Pound) for small purchases.
For other exciting destinations, explore our India to Vietnam Tour Package or check out our adventure tour packages to spice up your travels.
Because with Travelxploria—the Best Travel Agency—your journey through Egypt isn’t just a holiday. It’s a voyage through time.

packages.package_name: Discover the hidden Treasure of Egypt
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A mesmerizing blend of ancient wonders, vast deserts, and the timeless beauty of the Nile.

  2. Cairo: Explore the Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and the bustling Khan El Khalili Bazaar. Immerse yourself in the rich history and vibrant culture of Egypt’s capital.

  3. White Desert: Witness the surreal landscapes of chalk-white rock formations and golden dunes. Enjoy desert safaris, camping, and stargazing in this unique natural wonder.

  4. Dakhla Oasis: A hidden gem in Egypt’s Western Desert, known for lush palm groves, ancient mud-brick villages, and rejuvenating hot springs.

  5. Nile Cruise: Sail through history on a luxury cruise between Luxor and Aswan, visiting temples like Karnak, Edfu, and Philae while enjoying breathtaking river views.

After breakfast at the hotel, a representative of Travelxploria will pick you up and transfer you in an air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by an English-speaking Egyptologist, to the iconic Giza Necropolis. Explore the renowned Giza Pyramid Complex, including the Great Pyramid of Giza, the Pyramid of Khafre, and the Pyramid of Menkaure, along with their associated structures and the legendary Great Sphinx. Discover the rich history of the site, dating back to the Fourth Dynasty of the Old Kingdom. Continue your journey with a visit to the Papyrus Institute, a perfume factory, and a cotton shop to experience Egypt’s traditional crafts. Next, visit the Egyptian Museum, which houses an extensive collection spanning from the prehistoric era to the Greco-Roman period, with 107 halls featuring massive statues, a photography section, and a vast library. After an enriching day, you will be transferred back to your hotel for an overnight stay in Cairo.

Enjoy a full-day exploration of the stunning White Desert, a remarkable National Park and Egypt’s most famous desert destination. Take a leisurely walk through the mesmerizing limestone formations, where nature has sculpted incredible shapes resembling animals such as chickens, camels, and sphinxes, as well as tents and mushrooms. Marvel at the surreal beauty of this otherworldly landscape before returning to Shahrazad Camp to unwind and indulge in its luxurious comforts. Relax under the starry desert sky and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and memorable experience. Meals: Breakfast, Dinner.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Dakhla Oasis","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Farafra Oasis - Dakhla Oasis","day_summary":"

Dakhla Oasis is one of Egypt’s most remote and captivating desert treasures, nestled deep in the Western Desert. Surrounded by golden sand dunes and dramatic rock formations, the oasis is a serene blend of natural beauty and ancient history. Dotted with palm groves, hot springs, and mud-brick villages, Dakhla offers a unique glimpse into traditional desert life. Explore the ruins of Al-Qasr, a medieval Islamic town with narrow alleys and centuries-old architecture, and relax in the thermal waters of Bir Gebel or Bir Tarfawi. With its peaceful atmosphere and untouched charm, Dakhla is perfect for travelers seeking solitude, culture, and raw desert beauty.

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Kharga Oasis, where you will explore the historic Old City and visit the remarkable Temple of Hibis, an ancient sanctuary with well-preserved inscriptions. Continue your journey with a walk to the fascinating Christian tombs of Bagawat, one of the oldest and best-preserved Christian cemeteries in the world. After a day of discovery, check in and unwind at Pioneer Kharga Hotel or a similar comfortable accommodation. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a smooth and enriching experience throughout your journey. Meals: Breakfast, Dinner.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Nile Cruise","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":" Kharga - Luxor - Karnak Temple - Luxor temple","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you will be driven to your hotel in Luxor, where you will begin your exploration with a visit to the magnificent Karnak Temple complex, the second-largest ancient religious site in the world after Angkor Wat. Karnak was the most significant religious complex in Ancient Egypt, featuring grand pillars, towering obelisks, statues, and kiosks, a testament to nearly 2,000 years of construction. Next, visit the Luxor Temple, dedicated to the worship of the Almighty God of the New Empire, Amun. This temple played a crucial role in the rejuvenation of kingship and is believed to have been the coronation site of several pharaohs, including Alexander the Great. After the tour, you will be transferred to your Nile cruise, where you will check in and enjoy a relaxing evening onboard. Representative of Travelxploria will be there to assist you throughout the journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

After breakfast, meet your guide for an unforgettable visit to the West Bank of Luxor, starting with the legendary Valley of the Kings. While the visit to Tutankhamun’s tomb is not included, your guide will provide insightful explanations about the fascinating tombs in the area. Continue to the stunning Temple of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to the funerary cult of Queen Hatshepsut, followed by a visit to the majestic Colossi of Memnon. After the tour, return to your Nile cruise, where you will enjoy lunch while sailing toward Esna. Relax onboard as you take in the scenic views of the Nile, followed by dinner and an overnight stay. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a seamless experience throughout the journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Edfu temple - Komombo temple","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast on board the cruise before setting off to explore the magnificent Temple of Edfu, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, dedicated to the Hawk-God Horus. This grand Ptolemaic temple, built between the reigns of Ptolemy III and later rulers, features remarkable inscriptions, including the myth of the battle between Horus and Seth, believed to have been reenacted annually as a religious drama. After the visit, sail toward Kom Ombo, where you will have lunch onboard while admiring the Nile’s beauty. Upon arrival, visit the unique Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to both the falcon-headed god Horus and the crocodile god Sobek. Later, return to the cruise and continue sailing to Aswan. In the evening, enjoy dinner, attend an onboard party, and stay overnight on the cruise. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and enriching experience throughout your journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Aswan (Nile cruise)","day_summary":"

After enjoying breakfast on your cruise, embark on a fascinating tour of Aswan, beginning with a visit to the impressive High Dam, an engineering marvel built in 1960 to protect Egypt from the Nile’s annual floods. This colossal structure, containing 18 times the material used in the Great Pyramid of Cheops, spans 11,811 feet in length, 3,215 feet in thickness at the base, and rises to a height of 364 feet, providing essential irrigation and electricity for the entire country. Next, visit the Unfinished Obelisk, the largest known ancient obelisk, located in the northern region of Aswan’s stone quarries. Commissioned by Queen Hatshepsut (1508–1458 BC), it was intended to complement what would later be known as the Lateran Obelisk. However, due to cracks in the granite, the project was abandoned, leaving the obelisk still partially attached to the bedrock. After the excursion, return to your Nile cruise for an overnight stay onboard. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a smooth and enriching experience throughout your journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

After receiving your breakfast box from the ship and checking out, you will be transferred by an air-conditioned vehicle to Abu Simbel. This historic site, originally known as Meha in ancient times, was first documented during the 18th Dynasty when Ay and Horemheb carved rock-cut chapels into the hills. Upon arrival, visit the magnificent Abu Simbel Temples, built by King Ramses II. The larger temple is dedicated to the powerful sun god Ra-Horakhty, while the smaller temple honors Ramses II himself and his beloved wife, Queen Nefertari. After exploring these remarkable structures, drive back to Aswan (approximately a three-hour journey) and transfer to Aswan Airport for your flight to Cairo. Upon arrival in Cairo, our Representative of Travelxploria will meet and assist you at the airport before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and an overnight stay. Meals: Breakfast.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, embark on a tour of Old and Coptic Cairo, where you will explore the oldest areas of the city and visit its historic churches. Continue your journey to Islamic Cairo to visit the Citadel, a magnificent medieval fortress dating back to the 12th century, perched on a hill overlooking the city. Within the Citadel, discover the Mosque and Tomb of the great Ottoman ruler Mohamed Ali. Proceed to the Mosque of Sultan Hassan, an architectural masterpiece that uniquely houses religious schools for each of the four main Sunni Muslim sects. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for an overnight stay in Cairo. Meals: Breakfast.Representative of Travelxploria will accompany you throughout the tour.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Alexandria Overday","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, Representative of Travelxploria will transfer you from your Cairo hotel for a scenic 2.5-hour drive to Alexandria. Begin your exploration with a visit to the Catacombs of Kom el Shouqafa, an underground necropolis dating back to the 1st and 2nd centuries. Continue to Pompey’s Pillar, a 25-meter-tall red Aswan granite column built in honor of Emperor Diocletian. Enjoy a photo stop outside the historic Qaitbay Fort, a 15th-century fortress built to defend Alexandria on the very site of the ancient Lighthouse of Alexandria. Conclude your Alexandria tour with a panoramic visit from the outside to the Bibliotheca Alexandrina, a modern tribute to the original great library of Alexandria. After an enriching day, transfer back to Cairo for an overnight stay at your hotel. Meals: Breakfast.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Farewell - Cairo International Airport ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel, preparing for an unforgettable journey through Egypt’s most iconic landmarks. Begin at the Pyramids Plateau, home to the legendary Great Pyramid of Cheops, the Pyramid of Chephren, and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Stand in awe before the enigmatic Great Sphinx, a timeless guardian of these ancient marvels.

Continue your cultural exploration with a visit to the Papyrus Institute, where you’ll witness the traditional art of papermaking, followed by a shopping experience at the Papyrus Museum, Perfume Factory, and Jewelry Shop.

Later, dive into Egypt’s rich history at the Egyptian Museum, home to a vast collection of priceless artifacts, including the treasures of King Tutankhamun.The evening is yours to explore at leisure before returning to your hotel for a restful night Overnight in Cairo

As you glide along the legendary River Nile, enjoy personalized service, gourmet meals, and stops at off-the-beaten-path temples and villages. Visit hidden gems like El Kab, Gebel el-Silsila, and Edfu Temple, all while soaking in the timeless scenery of palm-fringed banks and ancient ruins. With fewer crowds and a slower pace, the Dahabiya cruise is a luxurious and authentic way to explore Egypt’s rich history and natural beauty.

Start your day with a leisurely breakfast on board as your Dahabiya sails towards Kom Ombo, a fascinating riverside temple dedicated to the gods Sobek and Haroeris. Disembark and explore this unique double temple, where ancient carvings depict medical instruments and rituals once practiced by Egyptian priests.

Return to the cruise for a delicious lunch as the Dahabiya continues sailing towards Edfu. Upon arrival, admire the magnificent Temple of Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, dedicated to the falcon-headed god.

Enjoy a relaxing evening on board, taking in the tranquil atmosphere of the Nile as you dine under the stars.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"El-Kab & Esna Exploration","day_summary":"

Begin the day with a scenic sail to El-Kab, the ancient city of Nekheb, once a significant religious and military center of Upper Egypt. Disembark to explore rock-cut tombs from the Old Kingdom, adorned with fascinating hieroglyphics and paintings, as well as the remains of ancient temples.

Return to the Dahabiya and enjoy a delicious lunch on board as the journey continues towards Esna, a charming town known for its temple dedicated to Khnum, the ram-headed god of creation.

Spend your final night on the Dahabiya, enjoying a delightful dinner and the serene beauty of the Nile.

Begin with a visit to the magnificent Karnak Temple, dedicated to Amun-Ra, where you can marvel at the towering obelisks and the grand Hypostyle Hall. Continue to the West Bank, exploring the Valley of the Kings, home to the tombs of Egypt’s legendary pharaohs, including an optional visit to Tutankhamun’s tomb. Visit the Temple of Queen Hatshepsut, a stunning tribute to Egypt’s first female pharaoh, and stop at the Colossi of Memnon, two massive statues that have stood for centuries. packages.package_name: Jewels of Egypt Tour
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, rich culture, and stunning landscapes along the Nile and the Red Sea.

  2. Cairo: The capital city, home to the iconic Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and vibrant markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Nile Cruise: A luxurious journey between Luxor and Aswan, exploring ancient temples like Karnak, Philae, and Edfu, with breathtaking river views.

  4. Hurghada: A Red Sea paradise, offering pristine beaches, scuba diving, snorkeling, and desert safaris.

packages.overview:

Wake up to a delightful breakfast on board as the Dahabiya sails towards Edfu, offering breathtaking views where the golden desert dunes meet lush date palm groves—a landscape unchanged for centuries. Upon arrival, visit the magnificent Temple of Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, where ancient ceremonies once honored the falcon-headed god with live falcons.

Continue sailing to Wadi el Shat, where you’ll take a scenic walk through charming villages and the vast desert, immersing yourself in the local way of life. As the sun sets, the Dahabiya anchors at a secluded island, where you can unwind and enjoy a magical dinner under the stars—either on board or along the tranquil banks of the Nile. Enjoy a peaceful second night on board, surrounded by the serenity of Egypt’s timeless landscapes.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Gebel el Silsila to Kom Ombo ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a peaceful breakfast on board as the Dahabiya sails to Gebel El Silsila, a hidden gem along the Nile. Relax on deck while watching timeless riverside scenes glide by. Upon arrival, explore the rock-cut chapels of Seti I, Ramesses II, Merenptah, and Horemheb, as well as the ancient sandstone quarries that once supplied Egypt’s grand temples.

As you enjoy lunch on the sun deck, the Dahabiya continues towards Kom Ombo, home of the fascinating double temple dedicated to both Sobek, the crocodile god, and Haroeris, the falcon god. In the evening, experience a magical dinner around a campfire on the banks of the Nile, creating memories under the starry sky. Drift into the third night on board embraced by the quiet charm of Egypt.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"From Desert Traders to Nubian Gardens ","day_summary":"

Wake up to a leisurely breakfast on board as the Dahabiya glides towards Daraw, a historic village once bustling with camel caravans arriving from Sudan after their arduous 40-day trek through the Libyan Desert. Stroll through the vibrant local market, experiencing its rich traditions and lively atmosphere.

As the journey continues, sail towards El Koubania, a charming Nubian village near Aswan. Wander through its lush gardens filled with citrus and mango trees, offering a refreshing contrast to the desert landscapes. Spend your final night on board, savoring a delightful dinner under the serene Nile sky. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell & Departure ","day_summary":"

Enjoy a final breakfast as you reflect on the unforgettable experiences of your Egyptian adventure. After check-out, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer to your designated hotel or airport, depending on your itinerary. Whether heading home or continuing your travels, we guarantee a smooth and hassle-free departure, leaving you with cherished memories of Egypt’s timeless wonders. Safe travels! 

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Esna","to":"Luxor Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.package_name: The Ancient Egyptian Tour with Luxurious Nile Cruise
packages.overview:
1: Arrive in Cairo, meet Travelxploria's Representative, transfer to hotel & overnight.

2: Visit Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx & Papyrus Institute, leisure & overnight in Cairo.

3: Full-day Alexandria city tour, return to Cairo & overnight.

4: Fly to Aswan, board Nile Cruise, visit High Dam & Unfinished Obelisk, overnight onboard.

5: Sail to Kom Ombo & Edfu, explore temples, overnight onboard.

6: Sail to Luxor, visit Karnak Temple, leisure & overnight onboard.

7: Visit West Bank of Luxor, fly to Cairo, transfer to hotel & overnight.

8: Check out, transfer to Cairo International Airport for departure.

packages.package_name: Delightful Cairo & Alexandria Tour
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, rich culture, and breathtaking Mediterranean views.

  2. Cairo: The bustling capital, home to the iconic Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and vibrant markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Alexandria: A coastal gem on the Mediterranean, known for the historic Qaitbay Citadel, Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Montaza Palace, and stunning seafront views.

packages.package_name: Egyptian Extravaganza with Nile River Cruise
packages.overview:
​1: Arrival in Cairo, meet & greet by Travelxploria representative, transfer to hotel, check-in, and briefing for the next day.
​2: Explore the Pyramids, Sphinx, and Egyptian Museum with a guided tour.
​3: Fly to Luxor, visit the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon, Karnak Temple, and Luxor Temple.
​4: Transfer to Esna, embark on Dahabiya Nile Cruise, visit Esna Temple, and sail to El Kab.
​5: Explore rock temples, visit Edfu Temple, sail to El Fawaz, and enjoy a campfire dinner.
​6: Sail to Gebel El Silsila, visit Horemheb Temple, enjoy tea and shisha, then visit Kom Ombo Temple.
​7: Visit Daraw village and camel market, sail towards Aswan, and overnight on Dahabiya.
​8: Disembark in Aswan, transfer to hotel, and enjoy a free day.
​9: Transfer to Aswan Airport, fly to Cairo, and check in at the hotel.
​10: Transfer to Cairo International Airport for final departure.​

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will assist you with check-out and transfer to Cairo Airport for your flight to Luxor. Upon arrival, begin your exploration of Luxor’s West Bank with a visit to the Valley of the Kings, where the tombs of ancient pharaohs, including Tutankhamun (optional entry), hold centuries of history. Your guide will provide insights into these magnificent tombs before you continue to the breathtaking Temple of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to Queen Hatshepsut, followed by a stop at the imposing Colossi of Memnon. After checking in at your hotel at 3 PM, set out to explore the grand Karnak Temple complex, the second-largest ancient religious site in the world after Angkor Wat. Be mesmerized by its colossal pillars, towering obelisks, and intricate kiosks, a testament to 2,000 years of construction. The journey continues with a visit to the Luxor Temple, dedicated to Amun, the supreme god of the New Empire. After this enriching experience, return to your hotel for an overnight stay in Luxor.

After breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria's representative will assist you with check-out and transfer to Esna, located 50 km south, the home port of your Dahabiya. Embark on a breathtaking 5-day cruise along the Nile from Esna to Aswan. Begin with a visit to the Esna Temple, followed by a stroll through the vibrant local markets. Sail onward to El Kab, the ancient town of Nekheb, where you will explore the remnants of its temples and discover tombs carved into the cliffs. As the journey continues, set sail to a serene island where the boat will moor for the night. Enjoy a delightful dinner on board or along the peaceful banks of the Nile before settling in for an overnight stay on the Dahabiya.

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will guide you to explore the magnificent rock temple and the remains of ancient monuments in the old quarries. As life along the riverbanks comes to life with fishermen beginning their daily work, relax on the sundeck while the crew sets sail towards Edfu. Visit the awe-inspiring Temple of Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, dedicated to the falcon god. The temple’s inner walls are adorned with intricate inscriptions, making it a true library carved in stone. As the day ends, sail to a tranquil Nile island, where you will enjoy a magical dinner around a campfire before spending the night onboard the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Gebal EL Selsila - Kom Ombo","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast onboard the Dahabiya while sailing towards the remarkable Selselah Temple, where the Nile flows at its narrowest between two mountain ranges. Travelxploria's representative will accompany you as you explore this fascinating site, typically untouched by large Nile cruisers. Visit the small temple of Horemheb and walk through the historic sandstone quarries, where ancient Egyptians sourced stone for their most renowned temples. Afterward, relax at a charming café while savoring traditional tea and shisha (waterpipe). Continue sailing to a picturesque riverbank for a delightful lunch onboard before visiting the stunning Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to the crocodile god Sobek and Haroeris. Conclude your day with a delicious dinner and overnight stay onboard the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Daraw - Aswan","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast onboard the Dahabiya as the captain sets sail for the village of Daraw, once the final stop for camel traders journeying from Sudan after a forty-day trek through the Libyan Desert. Travelxploria's representative will guide you on a fascinating walk through the village and its vibrant camel market, offering a glimpse into this historic trade hub. After immersing yourself in the local culture, the journey continues as the boat sails towards Aswan, where you will enjoy a delightful dinner and an overnight stay onboard the Dahabiya.

packages.package_name: Beautiful Egypt Package - Cairo, Alexandria and Siwa
packages.overview:
1: Arrival in Cairo, meet & greet by Travelxploria representative, transfer to hotel, check-in, and briefing.

2: Explore the Pyramids, Sphinx, and Egyptian Museum with guided tour.

3: Travel to Alexandria, visit Qaitbay Citadel, Pompey’s Pillar, and Catacombs, then check-in at hotel.

4: Transfer to Siwa Oasis, visit Mountain of the Dead, Alexander the Great Temple, Siwa House Museum, and Shali Fortress.

5: Visit Cleopatra Bath, swim in Salt Lakes, experience sandboarding, and enjoy a sunset with Bedouin tea and camp dinner.

6: Check out, drive back to Cairo (9 hours), check-in at hotel, and overnight stay.

7: Check out and transfer to Cairo International Airport for final departure.

Nearby, marvel at the magnificent Sphinx, a breathtaking structure carved from natural rock, featuring a lion's body stretching 45 meters with 15-meter-long paws. packages.package_name: Fully Loaded Egypt Tour
packages.overview:
1: Arrival in Cairo – Meet & greet by Travelxploria representative, transfer to hotel, check-in & briefing.

2: Cairo Tour – Visit Pyramids, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum.

3: Fly to Luxor – Explore West Bank (Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple) & East Bank (Karnak & Luxor Temples).

4: Embark Dahabiya Cruise – Visit Esna Temple & sail to El Kab.

5: Sailing to Edfu – Visit Edfu Temple & campfire dinner on a Nile island.

6: Visit Gebel El Silsila – Explore quarries, Kom Ombo Temple & enjoy onboard meals.

7: Visit Daraw – Explore camel market & sail towards Aswan.

8: Disembark in Aswan – Transfer to hotel & free day.

9: Fly back to Cairo – Transfer to hotel & overnight stay.

10: Cairo to Siwa via El Alamein – Visit WWII Museum & drive to Siwa Oasis.

11: Siwa Sightseeing – Explore Shali, Temple of Alexander, Amun Ra Temple, Mountain of the Dead & Cleopatra Spring.

12: Siwa Adventure – Visit Great Sand Sea, Bir Wahid, enjoy sandboarding & desert sunset.

13: Drive back to Cairo – Transfer & check-in at the hotel.

14: Final Departure – Transfer to Cairo International Airport.

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will accompany you on an unforgettable journey through ancient Egypt, starting with a visit to the iconic Pyramids. Explore the Great Pyramid of Cheops, the largest and only surviving wonder of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, followed by the well-preserved Pyramid of Chephren and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Marvel at the legendary Sphinx, a breathtaking structure carved from natural rock, with its lion’s body stretching 45 meters and paws extending 15 meters. Continue to the Egyptian Museum, where you will spend two hours discovering the world’s richest collection of ancient artifacts, including the fascinating treasures of King Tutankhamun, with his magnificent golden mask as the highlight.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Luxor","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Fly to Luxor - West Bank & East bank visits","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will assist with check-out and transfer you to Cairo Airport for your flight to Luxor. Upon arrival, begin your exploration of the West Bank with a visit to the Valley of the Kings, where the tombs of ancient pharaohs lie, including the famous tomb of Tutankhamun (not included in the visit). Our expert guide will provide insightful explanations about the remarkable tombs and their history. Continue to the stunning Temple of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to Queen Hatshepsut, followed by a visit to the towering Colossi of Memnon. After checking in at your Luxor hotel, set out to explore the Karnak Temple complex, the second-largest ancient religious site in the world after Angkor Wat. This vast complex, built over 2,000 years, features enormous pillars, obelisks, statues, and kiosks that will leave you in awe. Conclude the day with a visit to Luxor Temple, dedicated to the New Empire’s supreme deity, Amun. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for an overnight stay in Luxor.

As the journey continues, cruise towards a serene island, where the boat will anchor for the night. Enjoy a delightful dinner either on board or on the peaceful riverbanks of the Nile. After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will guide you through the exploration of the rock temple and the remains of ancient monuments in the old quarries. As the riverbanks come to life with fishermen beginning their day, relax on the sundeck while the crew sails towards Edfu. Upon arrival, visit the remarkably well-preserved Temple of Horus, dedicated to the falcon god, where the inner walls are inscribed with ancient texts, resembling a library carved in stone. As the day comes to a close, sail to a tranquil Nile island and enjoy a delightful dinner around a campfire. Overnight stay on board the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Gebal EL Selsila - Kom Ombo","day_summary":"

While enjoying breakfast on board, Travelxploria's representative will ensure a smooth sail to Selselah Temple, where the Nile narrows between two mountain ranges, creating a breathtaking view. As large cruise ships cannot dock here, you will have the rare opportunity to explore this secluded site. Visit the small Temple of Horemheb and walk through the ancient sandstone quarries, where stones were once cut for Egypt’s most iconic temples. Take a break at a picturesque café to sip on tea and try a traditional shisha (waterpipe). Later, sail towards a scenic riverbank for a delightful lunch on board. In the afternoon, visit the fascinating Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to the crocodile god Sobek and the falcon-headed Haroeris. End the day with a delicious dinner and overnight stay on board the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Daraw - Aswan","day_summary":"

While enjoying breakfast on board, Travelxploria's representative ensures a smooth sail to the village of Daraw, once a bustling hub for camel traders journeying from Sudan after a forty-day trek through the Libyan desert. Take a guided walk through the village and its lively camel market, where you can witness the traditional trade still in practice. After this unique cultural experience, continue sailing towards Aswan, where you will spend the night onboard the Dahabiya, enjoying the serene beauty of the Nile.

Discover the fascinating Old Town of Shali, followed by a visit to the Temple of Alexander the Great, also known as the Temple of the Oracle. Explore the Temple of Amun Ra, famously known as the Temple of Um Ubeyda, and marvel at the historic tombs at the Mountain of the Dead (Jabal el Mawta). Enjoy a refreshing swim at Cleopatra Spring before heading to Fitnas Island to witness a breathtaking once-in-a-lifetime sunset view. After a day filled with adventure, return to the hotel for a delightful dinner and overnight stay.

Begin with a visit to the breathtaking Great Sand Sea, home to a stunning desert lake, and if lucky, catch a glimpse of elegant flamingo birds. Continue to Dakrour Mountain, known for its healing sand baths, before experiencing the thrill of Siwa sandboarding across the golden dunes. Relax in the rejuvenating waters of the famous hot spring, Bir Wahid, and later, witness another mesmerizing sunset over the Great Sand Sea while savoring traditional Bedouin tea. Return to the hotel for a delightful dinner and overnight stay.

packages.package_name: Explore Magical Cairo with Travelxploria
packages.overview:
1: Arrival at Cairo Airport – Meet & assist upon arrival, followed by a smooth transfer to your hotel.

2: Explore the iconic Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx on a guided tour, immersing yourself in ancient Egyptian history.

3: Enjoy a leisure day in Cairo, exploring the city at your own pace or opting for optional excursions.

4: Another free day in Cairo, followed by a romantic dinner cruise along the Nile with live entertainment.

After a fascinating day, return to your hotel for a relaxed evening.

packages.package_name: A Grand Egyptian Delight
packages.overview:
​Cairo’s Iconic Landmarks: Explore the Great Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, and the Egyptian Museum with a Private Egyptologist.
Coptic & Islamic Heritage: Visit Old Coptic Cairo, including the Hanging Church, Ben Ezra Synagogue, and Holy Family Church.
Ancient Capitals: Discover Memphis, Egypt’s first capital, and the Step Pyramid of Djoser in Saqqara.
Alexandria Day Trip: Visit the Catacombs of Kom El Shoqafa, Citadel of Qaitbay, and Bibliotheca Alexandrina.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast at your hotel, fueling up for an extraordinary exploration of Egypt’s most famous landmarks. Accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and Private Egyptologist guide, visit the awe-inspiring Great Pyramids of Giza—Cheops, Chephren, and Mykerinos—standing as timeless symbols of ancient ingenuity. Marvel at the mystical Sphinx and explore the sacred Valley Temple, where pharaohs were prepared for eternity. In the afternoon, journey to Old Coptic Cairo, where you’ll visit the Hanging Church, Ben Ezra Synagogue, and the Holy Family Church, each holding deep historical and spiritual significance. After a day of discovery, return to your hotel for a peaceful overnight stay in Cairo.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Journey to Egypt’s Ancient Capitals: Memphis & Saqqara ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel, preparing for an incredible journey into Egypt’s earliest history. Accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and Private Egyptologist guide, set out to explore Memphis, the ancient capital of Egypt, where you’ll witness the colossal statue of Ramses II and the majestic Alabaster Sphinx. Next, travel to Saqqara, home to the Step Pyramid of Djoser, the world’s first monumental stone structure and a key milestone in pyramid evolution. Delve into the mysteries of Egypt’s oldest royal necropolis before returning to Cairo for a relaxing overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Day in Alexandria","day_summary":"

Begin your day with an early morning drive to Alexandria in a comfortable private car, accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and Private Egyptologist guide. Upon arrival, step into history with a visit to the Catacombs of Kom El Shoqafa, an underground necropolis blending Egyptian, Greek, and Roman influences. Next, explore the Citadel of Qaitbay, a 15th-century fortress built on the ruins of the legendary Lighthouse of Alexandria. Enjoy a scenic stroll along the Corniche, soaking in the Mediterranean breeze, before visiting the Bibliotheca Alexandrina, a modern tribute to the ancient Great Library. In the evening, return to Cairo for a relaxing overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Enjoy a final breakfast at your hotel, reflecting on the incredible journey through Egypt’s ancient wonders, vibrant cities, and breathtaking landscapes. After check-out, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless private transfer to Cairo International Airport, assisting with all departure formalities. As you board your flight, take with you unforgettable memories of Egypt’s timeless beauty.

packages.package_name: Wonders of Egypt - Aswan & Hurghada
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, breathtaking landscapes, and diverse cultural experiences.

  2. Cairo: The heart of Egypt, home to the Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and bustling markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Aswan: A scenic city on the Nile, known for the Philae Temple, Abu Simbel, Unfinished Obelisk, and peaceful Felucca rides.

  4. Hurghada: A Red Sea paradise, offering pristine beaches, snorkeling, scuba diving, and desert adventures.

packages.package_name: A Luxurious Expedition in Egypt
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, rich history, and breathtaking Nile landscapes.

  2. Cairo: The vibrant capital, home to the Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and lively markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Aswan: A serene Nile city, featuring the Philae Temple, Abu Simbel, Unfinished Obelisk, and peaceful Felucca rides on the river.

  4. Luxor: The world's greatest open-air museum, boasting the Karnak & Luxor Temples, Valley of the Kings, and Hatshepsut Temple.

Enjoy an overnight stay in Cairo, as you prepare for the incredible adventures ahead with Travelxploria’s expert guidance and impeccable service.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board, preparing for an exciting adventure with Travelxploria’s expert guide. At 07:00 AM, embark on a journey to explore the iconic Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx, marveling at these ancient wonders that have stood the test of time. After an immersive morning, return to the cruise and enjoy a delightful international buffet lunch while sailing along the Nile. In the afternoon, visit the world-renowned Egyptian Museum, home to an extensive collection of artifacts, including the treasures of King Tutankhamun. As the day winds down, indulge in an exquisite Lebanese buffet dinner on board, followed by a relaxing overnight stay in Cairo, with Travelxploria ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Pyramids, Sphinx, Sakkara & Memphis - Dahshour","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delicious breakfast on board, preparing for another exciting journey with Travelxploria’s expert guide. At 07:30 AM, embark on a visit to Memphis & Sakkara, where you will explore the Step Pyramid of Djoser, the first of its kind, and the ancient capital of Egypt. After a fascinating morning, return to the cruise and enjoy a Mediterranean buffet lunch while soaking in the serene views. In the afternoon, delve into the spiritual heart of Cairo with a visit to Coptic Cairo, exploring the Hanging Church, the Coptic Museum, and the Jewish Synagogue, each offering a glimpse into Egypt’s diverse religious history. As evening falls, savor a set-menu dinner on board, followed by a captivating Oriental Tkht show, bringing you closer to Egypt’s rich cultural heritage. Travelxploria ensures a seamless and unforgettable experience, ending the day with a peaceful overnight stay in Cairo.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Cairo | Beni Suef","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast on board, setting the tone for a relaxing full-day sail to Beni Suef with Travelxploria’s seamless arrangements. As you glide along the majestic Nile River, take in the breathtaking scenery and unwind in the luxurious comforts of your cruise. At 1:00 PM, indulge in a flavorful Mexican buffet lunch, savoring a variety of delicious dishes. As the evening sets in, enjoy a delightful BBQ dinner on board, accompanied by a live singer performance, adding a touch of magic to your Nile journey. End your tranquil day with a comfortable overnight stay in Beni Suef, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience with Travelxploria’s expert care.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Sailing to Minya","day_summary":"

Set sail for Minya at dawn, embracing a serene morning on the majestic Nile with Travelxploria’s seamless arrangements. Enjoy a delightful breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, soaking in the peaceful river views as you cruise towards your next destination. Midday, savor an exquisite French buffet lunch at 12:30 PM, offering a taste of fine culinary delights. As evening approaches, relish a carefully curated set-menu dinner at 7:30 PM, followed by an enchanting Folklore Party at 8:00 PM, where you can experience Egypt’s vibrant cultural heritage. Conclude the day with a comfortable overnight stay in Minya, ensuring a hassle-free and unforgettable journey with Travelxploria’s expert care.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Bani Hassan Tombs","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast on board at 5:00 AM, setting the tone for an exciting adventure arranged seamlessly by Travelxploria’s expert team. At 6:00 AM, embark on a fascinating journey to explore Tuna El Gebel and Ashmunein, sites rich with ancient Egyptian history. Return to the cruise for a light buffet lunch at 12:30 PM, before setting off at 1:30 PM for an awe-inspiring visit to the Beni Hassan tombs. Discover the Tomb of Baqet III (BH15), Tomb of Khety (BH17), Tomb of Amenemhet (BH2), and Tomb of Khnumhotep II (BH3) during an enriching two-hour guided tour. By 4:00 PM, return to the cruise for relaxation, followed by a delicious Italian buffet dinner at 7:30 PM. End your day with a peaceful overnight stay in Minya, enjoying the seamless comfort and care of Travelxploria’s exceptional service.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Tel El Amarna | Tawdrous Monastery","day_summary":"

At 5:00 AM, set sail toward Tel El Amarna, home to the fascinating Amarnian experience, with Travelxploria’s expert representative ensuring a smooth and insightful journey. Enjoy a hearty breakfast on board at 7:00 AM, preparing you for an immersive 10:00 AM visit to the northern tombs of Tel El Amarna, including the Royal Tomb of Akhenaten, the Northern Palace, and the Small Temples of Aten. By 1:00 PM, relish a delicious English buffet lunch on board while sailing towards Assyut. At 1:30 PM, pause to admire the magnificent Prince Tawdrous Monastery, with your knowledgeable guide sharing insights into its historical and religious significance. As the evening sets in, savor a BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM, enjoying the tranquil beauty of the Nile. Overnight stay in Tel El Amarna, ensuring a peaceful rest before the next adventure.

At 6:45 AM, embark on a fascinating visit to the northern tombs of Tel El Amarna, followed by the Royal Tomb of Akhenaten, the Northern Palace, and the Small Temples of Aten, where your guide will bring to life the rich legacy of Pharaoh Akhenaten’s reign. Continue to the ancient sites of Ashmunein and Tuna El Gabal, uncovering Egypt’s mystical past. Return to the cruise for a light buffet lunch at 2:30 PM as you sail toward Minya. In the evening, enjoy a set-menu dinner at 7:00 PM, followed by a vibrant Folklore Party at 8:00 PM, celebrating the region’s cultural heritage. Overnight stay in Minya, ensuring a restful night before the next adventure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Beni Hassan Tombs","day_summary":"

This excursion, approximately one hour from Minya dock, offers a two-hour guided exploration filled with captivating historical insights. Return to the cruise by 11:30 AM and set sail toward Beni Suef, enjoying a flavorful Moroccan buffet lunch at 12:30 PM. As evening falls, indulge in a delicious BBQ dinner at 7:30 PM, accompanied by a live singer for a delightful ambiance. Conclude the night with a fun Quiz Night at 9:00 PM, before an overnight stay in Beni Suef.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Coptic Cairo","day_summary":"

Relax and soak in the breathtaking Nile views before indulging in a traditional Egyptian lunch at 1:00 PM. In the afternoon, join your expert Travelxploria guide at 2:00 PM for a captivating Coptic Cairo tour, where you will visit the Hanging Church, the Coptic Museum, and the Ben Ezra Synagogue, each offering a glimpse into Cairo’s rich religious heritage. Return to the cruise for a delightful dinner at 7:30 PM, followed by an enchanting Oriental Takht show at 8:00 PM, showcasing traditional Egyptian music. Enjoy a relaxing overnight stay in Cairo, preparing for more unforgettable experiences ahead.

After a day filled with history and discovery, unwind on board with an elegant flambé dinner at 7:30 PM, soaking in the charm of Cairo’s evening skyline. We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

overview:
Best India to Egypt Tour Package – Discover the Land of Pharaohs and Pyramids

Welcome to Egypt, a land of pharaohs and pyramids, desert mysteries and timeless rivers. With Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency and your trusted Best International Tour Operator, experience Egypt like never before through immersive and thoughtfully curated Egypt tour packages. Whether you’re a curious historian, a romantic couple, or a family seeking cultural adventure, our packages promise memories carved in stone and golden sands.

Why Choose an Egypt Tour Package from India?

Direct Flight Options & Hassle-Free Visa Support for Indians
Indian travelers benefit from direct flight options and simplified visa processes. For the latest visa requirements and travel advisories, we recommend checking the official Egyptian Embassy website to ensure a smooth journey.

Ancient History, Majestic Monuments, and Unique Culture
Explore Egypt’s unparalleled heritage with iconic monuments such as the Pyramids of Giza, Luxor’s temples, and the Valley of the Kings. These sites not only embody ancient civilization but also offer captivating stories told by expert English-speaking Egyptologists.

Ideal for History Buffs, Families, Honeymooners, and Solo Travelers
Whether you’re booking Egypt tour packages from Delhi, Mumbai, or Kolkata, our tailored options cater to families, solo travelers, and honeymooners alike, with specialized experiences such as romantic Nile cruises and family-friendly guided tours.

Top India to Egypt Tour Packages

6 to 10 Days Egypt Tour Package – Cairo, Luxor & Aswan
Explore Egypt’s top highlights including Cairo’s pyramids and museums, Luxor’s ancient temples, and Aswan’s serene riverbanks. Optional hot air balloon rides over Luxor can be added for breathtaking views (additional cost applies).

Nile River Cruise Packages from India
Our India to Egypt tour package with Nile cruise offers luxury onboard entertainment and visits to riverside monuments, combining comfort and discovery in one seamless journey.

Egypt Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Our Egypt honeymoon packages feature romantic dinners under the stars, private Nile cruise cabins, and sunset desert safaris—creating unforgettable moments for couples. You can also browse our dedicated honeymoon packages for more romantic destinations.

Budget-Friendly Egypt Holiday Packages for Indian Travelers
Choose from affordable Egypt travel packages with well-curated itineraries, ensuring value without compromising on iconic experiences.

Customizable Egypt Itineraries for Families and Groups
Whether it’s a family trip or a group adventure, customize your itinerary to include cultural experiences, desert safaris, or visits to lesser-known sites like Nubian villages.

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Egypt Tour Packages

Cairo – Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum
Stand before the majestic Pyramids of Giza and the mysterious Sphinx, then marvel at Tutankhamun’s treasures in the Egyptian Museum. Our India to Egypt tour package with Egyptian museum visit includes guided tours by expert Egyptologists.

Luxor – Karnak Temple, Valley of the Kings & Hot Air Balloon Ride
Discover the grandeur of Karnak Temple and explore the tombs of pharaohs in the Valley of the Kings. Add a hot air balloon ride to see Luxor’s vast archaeological landscape from above (additional cost).

Aswan – Philae Temple, Unfinished Obelisk & Nubian Villages
Experience tranquility on the Nile’s banks, visit the beautiful Philae Temple, and meet Nubian locals to understand their rich cultural heritage.

Nile River Cruise – Luxurious Journey with Onboard Entertainment
Enjoy world-class amenities, live entertainment, and daily excursions as you cruise through Egypt’s heartland.

Alexandria – Roman Ruins and Mediterranean Coastline
Explore the Greco-Roman legacy in Alexandria with visits to the Qaitbay Citadel, Kom el Shoqafa catacombs, and the contemporary Library of Alexandria.

What’s Included in the Best India to Egypt Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Flights operate from Delhi, Mumbai, and Kolkata with convenient schedules. Passport validity of at least six months is recommended.

Hotel Stays and Optional Nile Cruise Accommodation
Choose from luxury hotels in Cairo, 5-star Nile cruise cabins, and boutique accommodations depending on your package.

Guided Sightseeing with English-Speaking Egyptologists
Expert guides ensure deep historical insight and engaging storytelling at every landmark.

Local Transfers, Entry Tickets & Egypt Visa Assistance
We handle local transport and entry fees for smooth travel. Visa assistance includes the latest documentation requirements. Please note: Optional activities such as hot air balloon rides and desert safaris may incur additional costs.

Best Time to Visit Egypt from India

October to April – Cool, Comfortable Sightseeing Weather
This period offers the best conditions for exploring Egypt’s deserts and archaeological sites.

May to September – Off-Season Benefits and Travel Deals
Travel during these months for fewer crowds and discounted tour packages, though temperatures can be high.

Seasonal Tips for Packing and Desert Travel
Bring sun protection for daytime and warmer clothing for chilly desert nights.

Frequently Asked Questions About Egypt Tour Packages from India

Do Indian citizens need a visa to travel to Egypt?
Yes, a visa is required but can be obtained easily with our assistance.

How many days are sufficient for a complete Egypt trip?
A 6 to 10-day itinerary covers major highlights comfortably.

Is Egypt safe and family-friendly for Indian tourists?
Yes, Egypt is safe with family-friendly attractions and guided tours.

What is the Egypt travel cost?
The Egypt travel cost varies based on package and inclusions, typically ranging between ₹70,000 and ₹1,50,000.

Does the India to Egypt tour package include a Nile cruise?
Yes, our India to Egypt tour package with Nile cruise includes luxury river travel with daily excursions.

Is there an India to Egypt tour package including pyramids visit?
Absolutely, every package includes visits to the iconic Pyramids of Giza.

Are desert safaris part of the India to Egypt tour package?
Yes, select itineraries offer desert safari experiences as optional add-ons.

Does the India to Egypt tour package include a visit to the Egyptian Museum?
Yes, guided tours of the Egyptian Museum are included in our comprehensive packages.

Is Abu Simbel temple visit included in the India to Egypt tour package?
Yes, optional visits to the Abu Simbel temples can be arranged to explore this UNESCO World Heritage Site, an architectural marvel built by Ramses II.

How to Book the Best Egypt Tour Package from India

Recommended Indian Travel Agencies Offering Egypt Packages
Book with trusted agencies like Travelxploria for verified packages from Delhi, Mumbai, or Kolkata.

Online Booking Tips and Exclusive Offers
Look out for early bird discounts and seasonal deals when booking online.

Documents Required, Currency Tips, and Local Etiquette
Carry a valid passport, travel insurance, and familiarize yourself with Egyptian customs for a smooth experience. It is advisable to carry some local currency (Egyptian Pound) for small purchases.
For other exciting destinations, explore our India to Vietnam Tour Package or check out our adventure tour packages to spice up your travels.
Because with Travelxploria—the Best Travel Agency—your journey through Egypt isn’t just a holiday. It’s a voyage through time.
